claimed_values.hours_text: Gates open at 7am and close at Sunset
claimed_values.parking_notes: Very popular surfing location with busy year-round parking lot. General Admission Day Use Fee $12-$25 per vehicle (demand based pricing) or valid annual California State Parks Vehicle Day Use Pass. Automated Pay Machine available at Cardiff Reef near restroom and at Seaside Parking Lot entrance. No camping or tailgating permitted.

Year-round parking allowed in numbered lots only. Multiple parking lots available (at least 18 lots). Information on parking areas available year-round at Main Business Office and Parking Lot #14, and seasonally at Entrance Check Station.
